overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a snowy tribal settlement. The scene features massive mechanical tentacle structures towering over distant mountains, wooden fortifications, and campfires under warm late-afternoon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open approach to tribal settlement with mechanical ruins

agents.ego_description: Aloy runs steadily toward the settlement entrance with mechanical structures visible in the distance

entered.detail: giant curved mechanical appendages towering over the mountain range
tall defensive walls made of wooden stakes marking the settlement entrance
burning fire with rising smoke near the gate entrance
snow-dusted rocky peaks forming the backdrop
scattered snow covering the ground and rocks along the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy running through an open landscape toward a tribal settlement. Massive mechanical tentacle structures loom over the distant snow-capped mountains, while a wooden fortification gate with a burning campfire marks the entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden fortification corridor with defensive stakes

events.description: entering the narrow wooden stake corridor of the settlement's outer defenses

agents.ego_description: Aloy runs through the narrow passage flanked by tall wooden defensive walls

entered.detail: tall vertical wooden logs forming the left defensive wall
tall vertical wooden logs forming the right defensive wall

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters a narrow corridor formed by tall wooden stake walls on both sides. The space is sheltered with mixed lighting from the sun and the recently passed campfire, creating a confined passage through the settlement's outer defenses.

scene_state.functional_zone: settlement interior with scattered wooden huts

events.description: exiting the narrow gate into the open settlement interior with wooden structures
location text 'MOTHER'S WATCH' appears on screen indicating area name

agents.ego_description: Aloy continues running through the settlement interior, navigating around wooden huts and rocky outcrops

entered.detail: primitive wooden dwelling with sloped roof and weathered planks
large boulders and rocky formations integrated into the settlement
scattered logs and broken wooden structures along the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow gate, the scene opens into the settlement interior featuring wooden huts, rocky terrain, and scattered debris. The location 'Mother's Watch' is identified as Aloy runs through this area, with the mechanical structures still visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner gate approach with carved totem poles and scaffolding

events.description: approaching the inner settlement gate flanked by tall carved totem poles
location text 'THOK'S WATCH' appears indicating entry to new sub-area

agents.ego_description: Aloy runs toward and through the inner gate marked by totem poles, heading deeper into the settlement

entered.detail: tall wooden poles with intricate tribal carvings and painted symbols
tall wooden poles with intricate tribal carvings flanking the path
elevated wooden platforms and bridges built against the cliff face

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Aloy approaching an inner gate marked by impressive carved totem poles on both sides. Beyond the gate, wooden scaffolding and platforms are visible against the rocky cliffs as the location changes to 'Thok's Watch'.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive snowy wilderness into the fortified interior of a tribal settlement. It begins with Aloy running across an open landscape toward a wooden fortification gate, with massive mechanical tentacle structures looming over distant snow-capped mountains. As she passes through the entrance, the view narrows into a confined corridor flanked by tall wooden stake walls under a mix of sunlight and the glow of a nearby campfire. The scene then opens into the interior of Mother's Watch, shifting from the narrow passage to a wider area of rocky terrain, wooden huts, and scattered debris. Finally, the camera follows her toward an inner gate adorned with carved totem poles, transitioning into the area of Thok's Watch where wooden scaffolding and platforms cling to the surrounding rocky cliffs.
